notes: New power-generation block. Slots into the vanilla power curve between Solar Panel 10 m (4 kW) and Reactor 7.5 m (160 kW). Accepts either raw coal (8 kW) or coal briquettes (22 kW) — the base block schema's fuel.consumesId field is single-valued, so the primary fuel is declared as coal_briquette and the raw-coal fallback is documented in description + dataGaps. Power ratio reflects real-world combustion efficiency (briquettes burn cleaner and drive a turbine more efficiently — not because they hold more energy per unit mass). BuildComponents reuse vanilla simple/complex components to keep the mod standalone. Stats first-pass.

resources.description: Burns coal or (preferred) coal briquettes to generate electricity. Raw coal yields ~8 kW at 1 unit per 30 s (~15% electrical efficiency, like a primitive coal stove). Briquettes yield ~22 kW at 1 unit per 30 s (~40% efficiency, like a modern coal power plant). Same refinery ratio (1 coal → 1 briquette) — the gain is efficiency, not energy density. Produces ash as a combustion byproduct. Unlocks earlier than the uranium reactor and fills the early-game planetary power gap.
